name: CAMPTOMELIC DYSPLASIA
distribution: anterior bowing (= campto) of long bones: marked in tibia + moderate in femur
discriminating_features: hypoplastic vertebral bodies + nonmineralized pedicles (especially lower cervical spine)

Chest & spine: hypoplastic vertebral bodies + nonmineralized pedicles (especially lower cervical spine)
Pelvis: narrow iliac bones with small wings
Extremities (lower extremity more severe: anterior bowing (= campto) of long bones: marked in tibia + moderate in femur
small secondary ossification center of knee
small primary ossification center of talus

clinical.Prognosis: death usually < 5 months of age (within first year in 97%) ← respiratory
